summary: Visual Contrast Improvement Verification Complete. All opacity upgrades verified across CustomerHome.js, CustomerCaseDetail.js, ProfilePage.js, and BottomTabBar.js. Text elements now have improved readability on both ivory (#EDE9E1) and dark (#0B0B0D) backgrounds.
critical_code_review_comments: CUSTOMERHOME CONTRAST VERIFIED: City/guests text (/35→/50), stage label (/50→/60), RM name (/80→/85), 'View case' link (/25→/45), timestamp (/20→/40), subtitle (/45→/55), section label (/25→/45), sub-label (/30→/45), chevron (/15→/25) - all readable

CUSTOMERCASEDETAIL CONTRAST VERIFIED: Inactive tabs (/30→/45), RM subtitle (/30→/45), Assistance label (/25→/45), action chevrons (/15→/25), message timestamps (/25→/35), placeholder text (/25→/35) - all visible
PROFILEPAGE CONTRAST VERIFIED: Form labels (/30→/45), email text (/40→/50), notification subtitle (/30→/45), logout text (/35→/45), chip text (/50→/60) - all readable
BOTTOMTABBAR CONTRAST VERIFIED: Inactive icon opacity (0.25→0.35), inactive labels (/25→/35) - confirmed via style inspection showing rgba(11, 11, 13, 0.35)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual contrast improvements verified. All text opacity values increased as specified. CustomerHome shows greeting, active case hero with city/guests/stage/RM name all readable. CaseDetail shows event banner, RM card subtitle, Assistance label, inactive tabs all visible. ProfilePage shows section headers, form labels, chip text, notification subtitle, logout button all readable. BottomTabBar inactive icons at 0.35 opacity, inactive labels at /35 - confirmed readable. Premium ivory/stone aesthetic maintained. Note: CustomerHome has some scroll (923px overflow) due to 'Other bookings' section with multiple cases - this is expected behavior, not a bug.
